title: Berchtoldia holciformis

The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, providing relief from anxiety, insomnia, and depression due to its antioxidant and anti-inflammatory properties. The bioactive constituents of Berchtoldia holciformis include hyperforin, hypericin, and flavonoids, which are responsible for its therapeutic effects. The most common herbal preparations made from this plant include teas, capsules, and tinctures, often used to treat mild to moderate depression and promote a good night's sleep.
